description: Convergence classification vectors. Verifies LOCAL_VALID ≠ GLOBAL_VALID, partition behavior, conflict detection, quorum disagreement, and settled convergence. Conformance classifies state; it does not create distributed authority.

invariants.local_valid_not_global_valid: LOCAL_VALID on a single node does not equal GLOBAL_VALID
invariants.conflict_produces_conflicted: conflicting proof roots produce CONFLICTED classification
invariants.quorum_disagreement_produces_ambiguous: quorum cannot agree → AMBIGUOUS; GLOBAL_VALID is forbidden
invariants.global_valid_requires_external_quorum_at: GLOBAL_VALID requires quorum attestation; conformance cannot grant it

vectors.description: local-only context: quorum_size 1, result_claim LOCAL_VALID — GLOBAL_VALID is forbidden
partition detected: partition_detected true — execution suspended; PARTITION_SUSPENDED

convergence_object.note: partition detected; execution gate suspended until topology resolves

vectors.description: conflicting proof roots: conflicting_proof_roots true — CONFLICTED classification

convergence_object.note: two incompatible proof roots; neither can finalize without settlement

vectors.description: quorum disagreement: quorum_disagree true — AMBIGUOUS; GLOBAL_VALID is forbidden

convergence_object.note: quorum cannot agree; GLOBAL_VALID is forbidden until consensus is reached

vectors.description: settled convergence: converged and epoch_match true — CONVERGED (not GLOBAL_VALID; conformance ≠ authority)

convergence_object.note: conformance classifies CONVERGED; it cannot grant GLOBAL_VALID — that requires external quorum attestation
